s3.bucket.loggingconfig.DestinationBucke.Docs: The name of the bucket where Amazon S3 should store server access log files. You can store log files in any bucket that you own. By default, logs are stored in the bucket where the `LoggingConfiguration` property is defined.

s3.bucket.loggingconfig.LogFilePrefix.Docs: A prefix for all log object keys. If you store log files from multiple Amazon S3 buckets in a single bucket, you can use a prefix to distinguish which log files came from which bucket.
